member.name: T:FileContentsQuery
member.summary:
Get the contents of a file. The content field is empty (no bytes) if the file is empty.
A query to get the contents of a file. Queries do not change the state of the file or require network consensus. The information is returned from a single node processing the query.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: P:FileContentsQuery.FileId
member.summary: Sets the file ID of the file whose contents are requested.
